+353 87 921 1841 brian@mkc. ie Connect on Linkedin Tim Kinsella / Director Tim is co-founder of MKC Communications. He has over 30 years’  experience in the public relations industry in Ireland. He provides strategic advice to high profile multinational and Irish clients across the energy, media, financial, technology, education and agri-business sectors.

He joined MKC in 2016 and took up the role of Managing Director in 2025. Prior to this he was Head of Communications for the leading business representative group the American Chamber of Commerce Ireland.  Brian holds a Masters in International Relations, a BA in Economics and History and Diplomas in both Public Relations and Leadership. Brian is the current chair of the Public Relations Consultants Association of Ireland, having first been elected onto its board in 2023.

## Our Team
Company About Us Our Team Services Work Latest Contact Us Company About Us Our Team Services Work Latest Contact Us Our Team The MKC team is highly experienced and dedicated, our team includes some of the most expert public relations and public policy professionals in Ireland.

Corporate Communications We have over 20 years’ experience working with a broad mix of Irish and International companies. The corporate communication services we provide are built bespoke for every client. We focus on each client’s individual needs and work to help them achieve their business goals. Our team create a unifying voice for your organisation, while building engagement among all stakeholder groups.

Our depth of expertise helps clients to articulate their key objectives. We work together to guide our clients on the strategy that will achieve these. The strategic advisory services we provide helps clients of all sizes to confidently plan for their future. Our teams have unrivalled experience and specialist skills. We have advised some of the largest companies in Ireland as they manage major changes and plan successful futures.

Through our work we help our clients succeed by enhancing and protecting their reputations. MKC Communications was founded in 1999 by Tim Kinsella and Laurie Mannix. For over twenty five years the company has been a trusted advisor to some of the biggest companies and public sector bodies operating in Ireland. Led by an experienced leadership team MKC team is among the most experienced and dedicated in the country. We adopt a personalised hands-on approach to client service.

## About Us
Company About Us Our Team Services Work Latest Contact Us Company About Us Our Team Services Work Latest Contact Us About MKC Communications About Us MKC Communications is one of Ireland’s leading PR and government affairs agencies. We are strategic advisors to our clients and provide them with a comprehensive set of services. This includes PR & media relations, government affairs, digital communications as well as crisis planning.

Laurie is a former Chair of the Public Relations Consultants Association (PRCA), and a Life Fellow of the Public Relations Institute of Ireland. She holds a Bachelor of Business Studies (Marketing) degree from the University of Limerick.

ie Connect on Linkedin Laurie Mannix / Director Laurie is co-founder of MKC Communications and one of Ireland’s most experienced PR practitioners with three decades’ experience in the public relations industry. She advises the CEOs of some of the leading companies in Ireland, providing strategic insights in corporate communications and reputation management.

Tim is an Honorary Life Fellow of the Public Relations Institute of Ireland, a member of the Emergency Planning Institute and the National Union of Journalists. A Political Science and Philosophy Graduate of UCD, he has a MSc Degree in Business Studies, specialising in Management and Organisation Studies. +353 86 813 7512 tim@mkc.

+353 87 921 1841 brian@mkc. ie Connect on Linkedin Tim Kinsella / Director Tim is co-founder of MKC Communications. He has over 30 years’  experience in the public relations industry in Ireland. He provides strategic advice to high profile multinational and Irish clients across the energy, media, financial, technology, education and agri-business sectors. He is also recognised as a leading expert in crisis planning and management.

He joined MKC in 2016 and took up the role of Managing Director in 2025. Prior to this he was Head of Communications for the leading business representative group the American Chamber of Commerce Ireland.  Brian holds a Masters in International Relations, a BA in Economics and History and Diplomas in both Public Relations and Leadership. Brian is the current chair of the Public Relations Consultants Association of Ireland, having first been elected onto its board in 2023.
